title: Eva nostrils
wikitext:
[]: Eva nostrils             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 02, 2007 7:19 pm while this may seem trivial, I must leave no stone unturned.... Eva 02 clearly has four nostrils, closely set together at the top of its head, above the eyes. Eva 03 also has four nostrils, close-set, above the eyes. Eva 01 has no visible nostril holes in its armor. ***Note, that they don't animate them into every shot even on ones that do **Does Eva 01 have nostril-holes in its armor? ...does the organic head of Eva 01, seen in episode 02, have nostrils? if so, how many? I cannot tell which are "nostrils" and which are "holes where the helmet was plugged in" The MP Evas do not appear to have nostrils.

[]: Re: Eva nostrils             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Nov 02, 2007 7:21 pm V wrote: while this may seem trivial, I must leave no stone unturned.... Eva 02 clearly has four nostrils, closely set together at the top of its head, above the eyes. Eva 03 also has four nostrils, close-set, above the eyes. Eva 01 has no visible nostril holes in its armor. ***Note, that they don't animate them into every shot even on ones that do **Does Eva 01 have nostril-holes in its armor? ...does the organic head of Eva 01, seen in episode 02, have nostrils? if so, how many? I cannot tell which are "nostrils" and which are "holes where the helmet was plugged in" The MP Evas do not appear to have nostrils.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 02, 2007 7:35 pm Eva-00 and the harpies? They don't fall into the pattern, so who knows.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 02, 2007 8:22 pm fall into what pattern? image hard to discern: so the nostril holes are just above Eva 01's mouth? thanks; invaluable photo

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 02, 2007 8:28 pm V wrote: fall into what pattern?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Nov 02, 2007 8:35 pm Reichu wrote: Eva-00 and the harpies? They don't fall into the pattern, so who knows.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Nov 02, 2007 8:49 pm thats a different topic

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 02, 2007 8:52 pm Look closely; what Fuyutsuki sees is an early Prototype with 5 eyes; Eva 00 has only one eye. It eventually became yet another Failed Eva Prototype. I have serious doubts that Eva 00 even has a jaw or teeth.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 02, 2007 9:17 pm V wrote: I have serious doubts that Eva 00 even has a jaw or teeth.

[]: Re: Eva nostrils             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Nov 02, 2007 9:36 pm V wrote: Eva 02 clearly has four nostrils, closely set together at the top of its head, above the eyes. Eva 03 also has four nostrils, close-set, above the eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Nov 03, 2007 12:32 am Reichu wrote: V wrote: I have serious doubts that Eva 00 even has a jaw or teeth.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 03, 2007 1:00 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: The nice monitor used during synch tests outright says it has jaws.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Nov 03, 2007 2:03 am Reichu wrote: Anonymous_Evafan wrote: The nice monitor used during synch tests outright says it has jaws.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Nov 03, 2007 6:55 am Isn't there a shot of Eva skulls that shows one that looks like a human skull, complete with two sockets for eyes? Eva-00 probably isn't a cyclops after all- just that it has a camera for a big eye. (Perhaps the clincher is that Eva-01, 02, and 03 all have eyes that glow-while the eye on Eva-00 does not. It seems like the eyes have been covered over and a single huge camera placed smack in the middle. Why? No idea. No idea if the harpies have eyes somewhere in there either.)

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Nov 03, 2007 11:10 am the Eva skulls actually show how each of the prototypes was different
